r2rtfExtras

The goal of r2rtfExtras is to provide some additional helper functions to assist in creating RTF output with r2rtf.

The primary wrapper functions are df_to_rtf and fig_to_rtf which are opinionated wrappers around boilerplate r2rtf code. There are additional capabilities currently not yet built into r2rtf. The r2rtf package remains an amazing tool for generating output in the RTF format. Make sure to read the official documentation.

This package is currently under active development.

Installation

The package can currently be installed from this Github repository using the following:

# If needed install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("Medtronic-Biostatistics/r2rtfExtras")

See the package website for more details.
